recommendations.title: Sorry, Baby
recommendations.overview: Agnes feels stuck. Unlike her best friend, Lydie, who’s moved to New York and is now expecting a baby, Agnes still lives in the New England house they once shared as graduate students, now working as a professor at her alma mater. A ‘bad thing’ happe

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: Leaving
recommendations.overview: A bourgeois housewife, planning to go back to work as a physiotherapist after having devoted 20 years to her husband and two children, has her comfortable, elegant life turned upside down when she falls for a Spanish builder and begins a runaway affa

recommendations.title: Baghban
recommendations.overview: After dedicating their whole life in upbringing their children, elderly couple Raj Malhotra and Pooja gets homeless. Instead of caring, their children treat them as a burden.

recommendations.title: Cries and Whispers
recommendations.overview: As Agnes slowly dies of cancer, her sisters are so immersed in their own psychic pains that they are unable to offer her the support she needs.

recommendations.title: The Poker House
recommendations.overview: Agnes and her two sisters struggle through a day in a home overrun by gamblers, thieves, and johns.

recommendations.title: Show Me Love
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls in small-town Sweden. Elin is beautiful, popular, and bored with life. Agnes is friendless, sad, and secretly in love with Elin.

recommendations.title: Spring in a Small Town
recommendations.overview: A married couple living in a desolate small town in post-WWII China are paid a surprise visit by an old friend of the husband's.

recommendations.title: Valentin
recommendations.overview: Valentin, an 8-year-old boy living with his grandmother in late-1960s Buenos Aires, is surrounded by problems in his family he finds only himself capable of solving.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.
